data.title: DTX Exchange: The Next Altcoin to Watch for 10x Gains
data.description:
As March approaches, investors are turning their attention to several altcoins that could potentially deliver significant returns. Among these, Cardano (ADA), Litecoin (LTC), and DTX Exchange have emerged as standout options for those seeking high returns in 2025.

DTX Exchange, a new contender, has already raised around $14.8M in its presale, with the token currently priced at $0.18. The platform aims to blend central and decentralized exchange models, offering solid liquidity and high-speed transactions of up to 200,000 TPS. DTX Exchange also provides users with exposure to over 120,000 tradable assets and offers the Phoenix Wallet for instant, low-fee transactions. With potential listings on major exchanges, DTX could be poised for a 10x surge.

While Cardano (ADA) and Litecoin (LTC) have faced market volatility, DTX Exchange's innovative approach could give it an edge over other altcoins. The ADA token's Proof-of-Stake (PoS) blockchain is esteemed for its low energy consumption and security, but its adoption has been slower than other newer blockchain ventures. The Litecoin price has shown resilience, trading at $132 now, but it faces competition from newer platforms with faster transaction speeds and smarter smart contract functionality.

For investors seeking 10x gains in 2025, DTX Exchange presents exponential growth potential. Its unique hybrid model and innovative features could give it an edge over Cardano (ADA) and Litecoin (LTC). As the presale bonus stage ends soon, now might be the time to grab DTX tokens before they hit major exchanges.

data.title: "Pi Network Launches Mainnet; XRP Price Surges Amid ETF Hopes"
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market witnessed significant developments on February 20, 2025, with the launch of the Pi Network, a surge in XRP price, and more. Here's a roundup of the key events:

The Pi Network, a new cryptocurrency project, officially launched its mainnet, marking a significant milestone for the project. The Pi Network aims to create a more inclusive and accessible cryptocurrency ecosystem by leveraging a unique consensus mechanism called "Proof of Space and Time." The launch of the mainnet allows users to start mining Pi tokens and participate in the network's governance.

Meanwhile, the price of XRP, the native cryptocurrency of the Ripple network, surged on February 20, 2025. The price increase comes amidst growing optimism surrounding the potential approval of a spot XRP ETF by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The SEC recently acknowledged a spot XRP ETF filing from Cboe BZX Exchange on behalf of Canary Capital, moving it forward in the approval process. The agency is now accepting public comments for 21 days before making a final decision.

In other news, World Liberty Financial (WLFI), a crypto-focused platform tied to Donald Trump, purchased 548,538 SEI tokens for $125,000 in USDC, according to blockchain tracker Lookonchain. The purchase is the latest in WLFI's ongoing crypto spree, following recent buys of MOVE and WBTC. The purchase is part of a broader strategy to diversify its crypto portfolio, which now includes significant holdings across multiple tokens.

Additionally, MANTRA rolled out RWAccelerator, a new program designed to support startups diving into real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, with backing from Google Cloud. The initiative provides funding, mentorship, AI-driven resources, and hands-on technical support for projects in real estate, finance, and beyond. Google Cloud will provide free cloud services and tech workshops. Experts predict that by 2027, 10% of the world’s economy could be stored on blockchain. Applications are open until March 20, and the program starts in April in Dubai, following MANTRA’s recent approval to offer crypto services there.

The cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, with new projects and developments emerging daily. As

data.title: Chainlink's 40% Drop: Whales Buy $20M, Analysts See Rebound or Deeper Correction
data.description:
Over the past month, Chainlink (LINK) has experienced a significant decline in value, with its price dropping by nearly 40%. This downturn has raised concerns among investors about the potential for a rebound and whether recent shifts in network activity might signal a recovery. As LINK's performance falters, analysts have stepped in to assess its trajectory and offer insights into its future prospects.

Ali, a renowned crypto analyst, recently shared his perspective on Chainlink's current position. He highlighted a nearly 40% price drop over the past month and noted a network contraction that may point to reduced activity. Ali also pointed out that LINK's MVRV ratio, an indicator of profitability for recent traders, currently sits at a loss of 16%. This level has historically preceded a pause in selling pressure, suggesting that the current drawdown could be nearing an end.

Despite the prevailing market conditions, there are signs of renewed interest among major investors. Ali highlighted that whales have acquired over $20 million worth of LINK in just the last 24 hours, hinting at a potential shift in sentiment. However, for a confirmed rebound, Ali suggested that LINK must break above the $19 mark to target $23.70. He also cautioned that if LINK fails to maintain its current support near $15.50, a deeper correction could follow.

Another analyst, known as Crypto Elite, offered a more optimistic outlook. According to Elite, the prolonged downtrend for Chainlink that began in 2021 has recently been broken, providing a foundation for future gains. Elite identified ambitious price targets at $53, $100, and even $144, suggesting that the current phase might represent the early stages of a significant upward move.

Notably, the coming weeks will be critical for Chainlink as it attempts to stabilize and possibly regain lost ground. It would be worth watching closely to see whether LINK can hold key support levels, sustain whale interest, and eventually climb past pivotal resistance points. As the market continues to evolve, investors and analysts alike will be keeping a close eye on Chainlink's performance to gauge its potential for recovery and growth.

data.title: SEC Drops Crypto Appeal; Coinbase Expands Derivatives; MicroStrategy Seeks $2B for Bitcoin
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has withdrawn its appeal against a Texas court decision that blocked a broker-dealer rule expansion. This move, proposed under former SEC Chair Gary Gensler, would have required crypto liquidity providers and automated market makers with over $50 million in capital to register as dealers. The proposed rule would have subjected decentralized crypto protocols to stringent regulations, including Know Your Customer and Anti-Money Laundering rules, which crypto advocacy groups deemed unenforceable due to the decentralized nature of these protocols. The dismissal marks an end to the legal contention initiated by crypto entities in response to what they viewed as regulatory overreach.

The SEC's decision to drop the appeal comes amidst a broader shift in the crypto landscape, with various developments shaping the industry's future. Coinbase, a leading crypto exchange, has expanded its crypto derivatives offerings with CFTC-regulated Solana and Hedera futures, catering to both institutional and retail traders globally. Additionally, Coinbase has introduced EURC perpetual futures, enhancing crypto-native FX trading with leverage.

Meanwhile, Strategy, formerly MicroStrategy, has announced its intention to offer $2 billion in convertible senior notes at 0% interest to fund bitcoin purchases and other corporate needs. The notes, maturing in 2030, may convert into cash or stock options, also allowing for an additional $300 million purchase option for initial buyers. This announcement follows Strategy's profitability warning and acknowledgment of $1.79 billion in impairment losses from its bitcoin holdings in 2024.

In other news, Tether Investments has proposed to acquire a 51% controlling stake in Adecoagro S.A., a South American sustainable production company. The offer of $12.41 per Common Share was made on February 14, 2025, aiming to increase Tether's stake from 19.4% to 51%. Adecoagro's Board is currently reviewing the proposal with assistance from legal and financial advisors to determine its suitability for shareholders.

HyperEVM, a significant development for Hyperliquid, has gone live, introducing full programmability with the initial release on its mainnet. Key features include the integration of HyperEVM blocks within L1, supporting secure transactions through HyperBFT consensus, enabling spot transfers between native and HyperEVM HYPE tokens, and deploying a canonical WHYPE system contract for

data.title: Viridien and Matnex: Accelerating AI-Powered Materials Discovery
data.description:
Viridien, a leading advanced technology and digital company, and Materials Nexus Ltd. (Matnex), a pioneer in AI-driven materials discovery, have joined forces to rapidly scale Matnex's computational capacity for the discovery and production of groundbreaking materials. This strategic partnership, announced on February 20, 2025, reflects a shared commitment to accelerating innovation and reducing the environmental impact of technologies critical to the net-zero transition.



By leveraging Viridien's Outcome-as-a-Service model, AI/HPC expertise, and optimization capabilities, Matnex will be able to industrialize its innovation pipeline and achieve the highest throughput of new material discoveries globally. This collaboration aims to unlock unprecedented commercial opportunities and drive industry-wide transformation.

Viridien's AI/HPC and optimization expertise will be integrated with Matnex's innovation pipeline through several key steps:

1. Data Integration: Viridien's HPC and AI/ML capabilities will process and analyze the vast amounts of data generated by Matnex's materials discovery process.
2. Model Development: Viridien will help Matnex develop predictive models and optimization algorithms tailored to their specific needs.
3. Workflow Optimization: Viridien will work with Matnex to optimize their workflows, reducing bottlenecks and improving overall efficiency.
4. Collaboration: The partnership will foster a collaborative environment, with Viridien's experts working closely with Matnex's scientists to drive innovation and accelerate the discovery of new materials.



The partnership is expected to significantly accelerate the timeline for the discovery and production of groundbreaking materials. Key milestones expected in the near future include:

1. Expansion of computational resources: Viridien will provide Matnex with unrivaled computational power, enabling the latter to tackle complex challenges that were previously beyond reach.
2. Rapid scaling of Matnex's computational capacity: With Viridien's support, Matnex will be able to rapidly scale its computational capacity for the discovery and production of groundbreaking materials.
3. Delivery of new material discoveries: The partnership is set to deliver the highest throughput of new material discoveries globally, with the first results likely to be announced within the next year.
4. Industrialization of Matnex's innovation pipeline: By leveraging AI/HPC and optimization expertise, Viridien will help Matnex industrialize its innovation pipeline within the next few months to a year.
5. Commercialization of new materials: With the partnership's focus on accelerating innovation and reducing environmental impact, new materials are expected to be commercialized and deployed in various industries within the next few years.

This partnership aligns with Viridien's corporate commitment to help catalyze technology innovations for a more sustainable future. By accelerating materials discovery, reducing environmental impact, and supporting the net-zero transition, the collaboration between Viridien and Matnex has the potential to unlock significant environmental and societal benefits, such as more efficient and sustainable technologies, reduced costs, and accelerated adoption of green technologies.

In conclusion, the partnership between Viridien and Matnex is poised to revolutionize the materials discovery landscape, driving innovation and sustainability in various industries. By leveraging AI/HPC and optimization expertise, the collaboration aims to deliver the highest throughput of new material discoveries globally, unlocking unprecedented commercial opportunities and industry-wide transformation.

data.title: Nilfisk's Q4 and FY2024 Results: Organic Growth and Margin Expansion Drive EBITDA Improvement
data.description:
Nilfisk, the global provider of professional cleaning equipment, has reported its Q4 and full-year 2024 results, showcasing organic growth and margin expansion that led to an improvement in EBITDA before special items. The company's CEO, Jon Sintorn, commented on the results, highlighting the key drivers behind the positive performance.

Key Takeaways from Nilfisk's Q4 and FY2024 Results:

1. Revenue and Organic Growth: Nilfisk's revenue for the full year 2024 amounted to 1,027.9 mEUR, corresponding to reported growth of -0.6% compared to 2023. Organic growth was 1.2%, driven by positive organic growth in the Service, Consumer, and Specialty Businesses, partially offset by negative organic growth of 0.9% in the Professional Business.
2. Gross Margin Expansion: The gross margin increased to 42.2% in 2024, 1.3 percentage points higher than in 2023 and the highest level since 2017. This expansion was driven by efficiency measures across factories, a favorable product mix, and diligent price and discount management.
3. EBITDA Margin Improvement: As a result of strong gross margin management, EBITDA before special items increased to 135.8 mEUR, equal to a margin of 13.2%. This was a 0.4 percentage point or 3.4 mEUR increase compared to 2023.
4. Financial Outlook for 2025: Nilfisk expects organic growth to be between 1% and 3% and the EBITDA margin before special items to be in the range of 13.0% and 14.0% in 2025. This is expected to be driven by continued positive momentum in EMEA, supported by the launch of new products in the second half of 2024. A normalized order book in the Americas is expected to influence the Professional and Service Businesses, while the outlook for Consumer and Specialty remains strong.



Drivers Behind Nilfisk's Performance:

1. Efficiency Measures and Product Mix: Nilfisk's efficiency measures across factories, favorable product mix, and diligent price and discount management contributed to the gross margin expansion. These factors allowed the company to reduce costs and increase profitability.
2. Strong Consumer Business: The Consumer Business experienced strong demand, with organic growth of 18.1% in the second quarter of 2024. This growth was attributed to seasonally-related high demand for high pressure washers, Nilfisk's growing market share in Western Europe for high pressure washers and vacuum cleaners, and product innovation, such as the new cordless vacuum cleaner Nilfisk S1.
3. Improved Service Business: The Service Business continued to grow, driven by the solid performance in EMEA and increased attachment rates. This growth contributed to the overall improvement in EBITDA before special items.
4. Optimization of Production and Distribution Footprint: Nilfisk plans to optimize its production and distribution footprint, which is expected to improve supply chain management, reduce logistics costs, and enhance the company's ability to respond to changing market demands and customer needs.

In conclusion, Nilfisk's Q4 and FY2024 results demonstrate the company's ability to drive organic growth and margin expansion, leading to an improvement in EBITDA before special items. The company's efficiency measures, strong Consumer Business, and improved Service Business, combined with its plans to optimize the production and distribution footprint, position Nilfisk well for future growth and success.

data.title: Microsoft's Majorana 1 Chip: A Quantum Leap Towards a Million Qubits and AI Revolution
data.description:
Microsoft recently introduced its first quantum computing chip, the Majorana 1, signaling a major step forward in quantum computing. This chip marks a significant milestone not only for Microsoft but also for the future landscape of quantum technology. Featuring innovative "topological conductor" technology, Majorana 1 integrates eight quantum bits (qubits), enhancing stability and control in quantum computations. Microsoft aims to eventually integrate up to one million qubits, vastly expanding the potential applications of quantum computing.

The Majorana 1's topological approach offers a robust resistance to interference, making it more stable compared to other quantum methods. The research underpinning this technology was published in the prominent journal Nature, underscoring its scientific merit and practical impact. Microsoft asserts that the advent of a functional quantum computer could be just a few years away, highlighting the significant implications of early research milestones in the field.

Currently, the Majorana 1 chip is not available for commercial sale. Instead, it is deployed in collaboration with national laboratories and academic institutions, allowing Microsoft to explore various application potentials of quantum computing and further refine its artificial intelligence systems. The potential applications of quantum computing in artificial intelligence, such as accelerating drug discovery processes, could become critical in shaping multiple industries.

The unveiling of Majorana 1 occurs amidst a rapidly evolving market where quantum computing is gaining significant traction. Microsoft's advancement is expected to spur its rivals to accelerate their technological developments and increase public awareness and understanding of quantum computation. As quantum computing increasingly intersects with AI, Majorana 1 positions Microsoft to potentially dominate in future tech-driven markets and redefine consumer expectations for high-performance computing.

Overall, Microsoft's Majorana 1 chip represents a breakthrough in quantum computing technologies, opening up new opportunities for innovation and collaboration across the industry. As related technologies continue to develop, consumers are likely to experience unparalleled computational power, unlocking new applications. Embracing this critical technological trend and monitoring advancements from Microsoft and the quantum computing sector will be essential for tech enthusiasts and industry professionals alike.

data.title: Alibaba Q4 Earnings Preview: AI Growth, Apple Partnership, and Market Expectations
data.description:
Alibaba Group (BABA) is set to report its highly anticipated quarterly earnings on Thursday before the market opens, with analysts expecting earnings per share (EPS) of $2.69 and revenue of $38.45 billion. This comes amid a strong rally in Alibaba shares, which have surged nearly 50% year-to-date, driven by enthusiasm over its artificial intelligence (AI) initiatives, a newly announced partnership with Apple, and a shift in sentiment following co-founder Jack Ma’s recent meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.

A key area to watch in the earnings report is Alibaba’s cloud segment, particularly its advancements in AI, including its collaboration with DeepSeek and its proprietary AI model, Qwen 2.5-Max. Analysts believe Alibaba’s AI developments could play a major role in its long-term growth trajectory. Additionally, the partnership with Apple to integrate Alibaba’s AI capabilities into iPhone features in China could provide a significant boost to its cloud and AI businesses. These initiatives have positioned Alibaba as a leading player in China’s AI infrastructure, but execution will be critical in determining long-term market adoption.

Despite the recent stock rally, Alibaba remains relatively undervalued compared to peers like Amazon and Sea Limited. Its forward P/E ratio of 10.90 is well below the industry average of 32.41, indicating potential upside if it continues to deliver strong results. Additionally, Alibaba’s price-to-sales (P/S) and price-to-book (P/B) ratios remain attractive relative to competitors, reinforcing the case that the stock is cheap compared to its long-term growth potential. However, given the sharp rise in share price, investors will be looking for strong guidance and performance to sustain recent gains.

Alibaba’s e-commerce business remains its core revenue driver, and analysts will be watching whether it can maintain its market share amid growing competition from PDD Holdings and JD.com. Additionally, management’s commentary on international expansion, particularly through its integration of domestic Taobao and Tmall with its global marketplace, will be key. Growth in its advertising and logistics businesses will also be critical indicators of future profitability, as these high-margin segments have been a major focus for the company.

On the macroeconomic front, Alibaba has faced challenges due to China’s uneven economic recovery, regulatory scrutiny, and geopolitical tensions. However, recent policy shifts by the Chinese government, including efforts to restore private sector confidence, could provide a tailwind. The presence of Jack Ma at a recent symposium with Xi has fueled speculation that regulatory pressures may ease, potentially benefiting Alibaba and other Chinese tech giants. Investors will closely monitor management’s tone regarding regulatory concerns and government support for tech sector growth.

Looking ahead, Alibaba’s results will be a key test of whether the company can sustain its strong rally and reassure investors about its growth trajectory. The market will be looking for positive guidance on AI monetization, e-commerce stability, and margin expansion in its cloud business. With options traders pricing in significant volatility, Alibaba’s stock reaction post-earnings will largely depend on whether the company meets or exceeds expectations in these critical areas. If Alibaba delivers on AI momentum and continued business expansion, it could reinforce bullish sentiment and push shares higher.

data.title: Gibraltar Industries' Q4 2024: Contradictions in Revenue Trends, Agtech Growth, and Renewable Energy Outlook
data.description:
These are the key contradictions discussed in Gibraltar Industries' latest 2024Q4 earnings call, specifically including: Revenue Trends and Expectations, Agtech Segment Growth, Residential Market Growth Expectations, and Renewable Energy Market Dynamics:



Financial Performance and Revenue Growth:
- Gibraltar Industries reported a revenue of $588 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, outperforming the previous year's revenue by 7.6%.
- This growth was primarily driven by strong sales within the company's architectural products segment and favorable foreign exchange rates.

Architectural Products Segment Performance:
- The architectural products segment achieved a historical high in sales, contributing to 54% of the company's total revenue.
- The strong performance in this segment was supported by robust residential construction activity and favorable product mix.

Construction Activity and Market Conditions:
- Gibraltar Industries noted robust residential construction activity and favorable market conditions, particularly in the U.S., which positively impacted its financial performance.
- The company also experienced the positive effects of strong order backlogs and a focused approach to cost management.

Geographical Diversification and Asia Pacific Growth:
- The company's sales outside North America reached 39% of total revenue, marking a new record.
- The Asia Pacific region showed impressive growth due to increased demand for architectural products and robust construction activity.

data.title: Binance Delists ALGO Pairs: A New Era for Crypto Traders
data.description:
Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, has announced the delisting of several trading pairs involving the Algorand (ALGO) cryptocurrency. The move, set to take effect on February 21, 2025, at 14:00 (UTC+8), includes the removal of ALGO/USDT, ALGO/USDC, ATOM/USDT, ATOM/FDUSD, and ATOM/USDC trading pairs from the platform.

The decision, part of Binance's ongoing effort to optimize its offerings and enhance market efficiency, may significantly impact traders and investors focusing on these cryptocurrencies. The exchange, committed to aligning with best practices in the evolving crypto market, aims to ensure that only the most viable trading pairs remain available on its platform.

Stakeholders are advised to review their positions accordingly in light of this announcement. The delisting of these trading pairs may necessitate adjustments in investment strategies and portfolio allocations. As the crypto market continues to evolve, exchanges like Binance remain vigilant in their efforts to maintain a robust and efficient trading environment.

data.title: TAO Surges 20% in 24 Hours, Investor Nets $145K in PAIN Presale
data.description:
TAO Price Surges to $450, Marking Over 20% Gain in 24 Hours

The price of TAO has surged to $450, marking an over 20% gain in just 24 hours. This significant increase has caught the attention of investors and analysts alike, as the cryptocurrency market continues to experience volatility.

One savvy investor, who previously made over $17.3 million in profits from celebrity coins like TRUMP, has once again earned $145,000 from participating in the PAIN presale. This demonstrates the potential for significant returns in the cryptocurrency market, even in the face of recent volatility.

Analysis of the PAIN allocation shows that the community and partner total of 15% has not been transferred or sold, currently providing $11.37 million in liquidity. This suggests that there is still significant potential for growth in the PAIN market, as the allocation remains untapped.

In the last hour, PAIN has surged above $20, up around 40%. This rapid increase in price highlights the potential for quick gains in the cryptocurrency market, as investors seek out promising opportunities.

However, it is important to note that the cryptocurrency market is highly volatile, and prices can fluctuate rapidly. A certain sniper address paid a large network fee for a transaction involving PAIN, losing 2540 SOL coins in the process. This serves as a reminder that while the potential for significant gains exists, there are also risks involved in investing in cryptocurrencies.

As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, investors and analysts will be watching closely to see how TAO and other cryptocurrencies perform in the coming days and weeks. With the potential for significant gains and rapid price fluctuations, the market remains an exciting and dynamic space for investors to explore.

data.title: XRP Bulls Eye $5 as SEC ETF Filing Sparks Hope
data.description:
XRP, the native cryptocurrency of Ripple, has been making waves in the crypto market, with its price prediction drawing significant attention. The recent acknowledgment of a spot XRP ETF filing by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has sparked speculation that XRP could potentially breach the $5 barrier. With XRP's Relative Strength Index (RSI) hovering around 40%, a level often associated with a bullish rally, investors are eagerly awaiting the next big move.

Meanwhile, JetBolt (JBOLT), a blockchain-based project, is gaining traction with its innovative Zero-Gas Technology. This technology aims to eliminate gas fees and streamline Web3 interactions, making blockchain more accessible to users and developers. With nearly 330 million tokens sold in its presale, JetBolt is positioning itself as a game-changer in the blockchain space.

The SEC's acknowledgment of the spot XRP ETF filing, submitted by Cboe BZX Exchange on behalf of Bitwise, has triggered a 21-day public comment period. Following this, the SEC will decide whether to approve, reject, or initiate further review of the ETF. This move comes as the newly formed SEC crypto task force, led by Republican Commissioner Hester Peirce, works to establish a more defined regulatory framework for digital assets.

Market analysts are closely monitoring XRP's momentum, with Matrixport analysts highlighting the RSI near 40% as a potential signal for an incoming rally. If market conditions align and ETF approvals move forward, traders believe a run toward $5 is within reach, although volatility remains a key factor. Recent shifts in SEC enforcement priorities, following leadership changes, have also led to speculation that the agency may pause or withdraw its Ripple appeal, further easing regulatory uncertainty.

JetBolt's Zero-Gas Technology, built on the Skale Network, eliminates the need for gas fees while ensuring near-instant transactions. This frictionless experience benefits both seasoned crypto traders and newcomers, making Web3 interactions more accessible. Additionally, JetBolt's AI-powered crypto content aggregator scans and categorizes blockchain news and Web3 insights based on market sentiment, providing valuable insights to users.

JetBolt's ecosystem also features an engagement-based staking mechanism called Proof of Attendance and Worth (PAW) protocol. Unlike traditional staking, PAW rewards active st

data.title: Morning Bid: Gold and Yen Bask in the Limelight
data.description:
As the sun rises on a new trading day, two assets have been stealing the show: gold and the Japanese yen. Both have been basking in the limelight, drawing investors' attention with their impressive performances. Let's dive into the reasons behind their recent success and explore how investors can capitalize on these trends.



Gold has been on a tear, surging to record highs in all major currencies. The precious metal finished January on an all-time-high of US$2,812, up 8% on the month. This strong start to the year builds on gold's solid seasonal record. Several factors contributed to gold's remarkable performance, including tariff fears, a weaker US dollar, and lower bond yields. The Geopolitical Risk index (GPR) also rose significantly, while the lagged momentum effect of a strong US dollar in December was the only major drag on gold prices (Chart 1).

The Chinese gold market showed evidence of strong start to an auspicious 'year of the snake' for gold, with an average premium of US$6/oz recorded following several months of discounts. Additionally, intraday slicing of spot gold prices in January suggested activity during Asian hours, including the 11am AM price, were instrumental in performance last month (Table 2). This positive momentum is expected to continue into February, auguring well for gold investors.



The Japanese yen has also been a star performer, benefiting from a flight-to-quality effect during times of market volatility. Investors sell riskier assets and seek shelter in the relative safety of the yen, driving up its value. This phenomenon was evident during the Asian Financial Crisis in 1998, the Russian ruble default in 1998, and the global Financial Crisis in 2008. The yen's safe haven status has been further reinforced by the Bank of Japan's efforts to stabilize financial markets during times of distress, including injecting liquidity and providing forward guidance on interest rates.

Investors can capitalize on these dynamics by allocating a portion of their portfolio to gold and the Japanese yen during times of economic uncertainty. Monitoring economic indicators, geopolitical events, and central bank policies can help identify potential safe-haven opportunities. Additionally, considering derivatives, such as options or futures, can provide exposure to gold and the yen without committing significant capital. Diversifying the portfolio by investing in other safe-haven assets, such as US Treasury bonds or Swiss francs, can further reduce risk.

In conclusion, gold and the Japanese yen have been shining stars in the morning bid, driven by a combination of short-term market forces and broader macroeconomic trends. By staying informed about market trends and adjusting investment strategies accordingly, investors can take advantage of these dynamics and secure their portfolios during uncertain times.

data.title: Nasdaq Revolutionizes Crypto Market with Cutting-Edge ETF Structure
data.description:
Nasdaq, a leading global exchange operator, is making significant strides in the cryptocurrency market by developing a cutting-edge structure for cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs). This innovative approach aims to provide investors with a more accessible and regulated way to gain exposure to digital assets.

In recent years, the cryptocurrency market has experienced rapid growth and increased interest from both retail and institutional investors. However, the lack of regulatory clarity and the volatility of the market have posed challenges for investors seeking to participate in this asset class. Nasdaq's new ETF structure aims to address these concerns by offering a more structured and regulated investment vehicle.

Nasdaq's ETF structure will allow investors to gain exposure to a diversified portfolio of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Ethereum, through a single investment vehicle. This will provide investors with the benefits of diversification, while also offering the liquidity and transparency associated with traditional ETFs.

The new ETF structure will be subject to the same regulatory oversight as other ETFs, ensuring that investors have access to a secure and transparent investment vehicle. This will help to address the concerns of regulators and investors alike, who have been cautious about the lack of regulatory clarity in the cryptocurrency market.

Nasdaq's move to develop a cutting-edge ETF structure for digital assets is a significant step forward in the evolution of the cryptocurrency market. By providing investors with a more accessible and regulated way to gain exposure to digital assets, Nasdaq is helping to pave the way for wider adoption and acceptance of cryptocurrencies as a legitimate asset class.

data.title: OKX Expands Derivatives Offering with KAITO Perpetual Swap and Margin Trading
data.description:
OKX, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, has announced its plans to list KAITO Perpetual Swap and Margin Trading. This move is set to expand the platform's offerings and cater to the growing demand for derivatives trading in the cryptocurrency market.

The listing of KAITO Perpetual Swap and Margin Trading on OKX is expected to provide users with more options for hedging their portfolios and gaining exposure to the cryptocurrency market. Perpetual swaps are a type of derivative contract that allows traders to speculate on the price of an asset without owning it. Margin trading, on the other hand, enables traders to use borrowed funds to control a larger position, potentially amplifying their profits.

OKX's decision to list KAITO Perpetual Swap and Margin Trading comes at a time when the cryptocurrency market is experiencing significant growth and volatility. The exchange has been actively expanding its offerings to meet the diverse needs of its users, including the recent launch of its decentralized exchange (DEX) and the integration of the Lightning Network for faster Bitcoin transactions.

The listing of KAITO Perpetual Swap and Margin Trading on OKX is expected to attract a wider range of traders, from experienced professionals to novice investors looking to explore the world of derivatives trading. The exchange's user-friendly platform and robust security measures are likely to make it an attractive destination for these traders.

In other news, a savvy investor has reportedly earned over $145,000 from participating in the PAIN presale. The investor, who previously made over $17.3 million in profits from celebrity coins like TRUMP, has once again demonstrated their ability to identify promising opportunities in the cryptocurrency market.

The PAIN token, which is the native currency of the PAIN platform, has been surging in recent hours, with its price rising above $20 and increasing by around 40% in the last hour. This sudden surge in price has been attributed to the growing interest in the PAIN platform and its unique features.

Meanwhile, a certain sniper address has reportedly paid a large network fee for a transaction involving the PAIN token, resulting in the loss of 2540 SOL coins. This incident highlights the importance of careful transaction management and the potential risks associated with high network fees in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Brazil Greenlights First Latin American XRP ETF
data.description:
Brazil is poised to become the first country in Latin America to launch a spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) following regulatory approval from the Brazilian Securities and Exchange Commission (CVM). This significant development marks a key milestone for cryptocurrency investment vehicles in the region, potentially setting a precedent for others to follow.

The Hashdex Nasdaq XRP Index Fund, currently in its pre-operational phase, is expected to debut on Brazil's B3 exchange, although an official launch date remains unconfirmed. This ETF is anticipated to provide investors with a regulated avenue to gain exposure to XRP, which has historically experienced volatility amidst regulatory scrutiny.

The approval of the spot XRP ETF in Brazil comes at a time when multiple spot XRP ETF applications are also under consideration by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The growing interest from various financial firms indicates a robust appetite for regulated crypto investment vehicles, suggesting a shift towards mainstream acceptance of digital assets as viable investment options.

As regulatory frameworks become more defined, particularly following the reelection of crypto-friendly candidates, the overall sentiment towards cryptocurrency could shift favorably. The establishment of the SEC's crypto task force indicates a proactive approach to bypass ambiguities surrounding which cryptocurrencies qualify as financial securities. Such clarity could ease the path for further ETF approvals, reflecting a growing acceptance of cryptocurrencies in the traditional financial ecosystem.

Ripple's ongoing legal skirmish with the SEC continues to be a focal point for the XRP community. The SEC's allegations that Ripple offered XRP as unregistered securities have created uncertainty for investors. However, with reports that the legal proceedings may replicate the SEC's previous pauses in litigation against Binance, there could be potential for a resolution that positively impacts XRP's market standing. Recent social media activity from former President Donald Trump, including shares related to Ripple, has heightened speculation about possible collaborations, further elevating interest in XRP.

In response to the news regarding the ETF approval and ongoing regulatory developments, XRP has seen an uptick of 7% in the last 24 hours, trading at approximately $2.70. This surge is indicative of investor optimism surrounding the future of XRP amidst evolving regulatory clarity. As the market absorbs these changes, many analysts suggest a closer examination of Ripple's potential partnerships and strategic moves could yield significant implications for X

data.title: Pundi AI, T+ Wallet Team Up: Users Earn Rewards Labeling Data
data.description:
Pundi AI, a leading AI-driven data platform, has announced a strategic partnership with T+ Wallet, a Hong Kong-based cryptocurrency wallet and Web3 communication platform. The collaboration aims to integrate Pundi AI's data platform into the T+ Wallet application, enabling over 100,000 users to participate in data labeling tasks directly within the wallet and earn rewards.

T+ Wallet, the first application in Hong Kong to combine instant messaging with a cryptocurrency wallet, supports various cryptocurrencies and cross-chain transactions. Zac Cheah, the founder of Pundi AI, expressed his enthusiasm for the collaboration, highlighting the potential of decentralized data communication tagging services to benefit a larger user base. Stark Chen, the founder of T+ Wallet, emphasized that this innovative feature not only creates new revenue opportunities for users but also advances the vision of digital wallets transitioning to practical Web3 applications.

The integration of Pundi AI's data platform into T+ Wallet allows users to contribute to data labeling tasks while earning rewards. This collaboration is a significant step towards leveraging the power of AI and blockchain technology to create a more inclusive and rewarding user experience in the cryptocurrency and Web3 ecosystem.

As the partnership between Pundi AI and T+ Wallet continues to unfold, it is expected to bring new opportunities for users to engage with data labeling tasks and earn rewards. This collaboration also highlights the growing trend of integrating AI and blockchain technologies to create innovative and user-friendly applications in the cryptocurrency and Web3 space.

data.title: Dogecoin Whales Stay Sidelined Amid Price Lull, But Analyst Sees $1.50 Target
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) whales have adopted a wait-and-watch strategy amid the meme coin's ongoing corrective phase, according to a prominent cryptocurrency analyst. Ali Martinez, who frequently analyzes technical and on-chain indicators of top coins, noted that Dogecoin whales have "stayed on the sidelines," with no significant buying or selling activity. This lack of activity is further supported by the fact that these whales owned over 41% of Dogecoin's supply, indicating that they have not been actively trading or moving their holdings.

Combined, they owned over 41% of Dogecoin’s supply as of this writing, according to IntoTheBlock. Notably, the world’s largest meme coin, valued at over $37 billion, has slid 3.37% in the last week and over 25% over the month, potentially eroding buying interest. However, the reluctance to sell indicated confidence in a rebound.

Trader Tardigrade, a popular trader known for their bullish outlook on Dogecoin, drew attention to the Stochastic Relative Strength Index’s crossover in the oversold zone, prompting a target of $1.50 for the coin. Should the prediction come true, it'd mean an upside of 500% from Dogecoin's prevailing price.

Dogecoin's price movements have been the subject of much speculation in the past few months by various crypto analysts, with many of the analyses based on its pattern repetition in market cycles. A recent analysis posted on the TradingView platform delves deeply into Dogecoin's technical outlook with indicators such as Fibonacci levels, Elliott Wave Theory, and the Wyckoff Method to forecast both downside and upside price targets for the cryptocurrency.

Macro Analysis: Elliott Waves And Fibonacci Levels Show Liquidity Zones

According to the analyst, Dogecoin's price has been following a clear Elliott Wave structure starting from its bear market low of $0.045 in 2022 until its recent multi-year peak of $0.48 in December 2024. Interestingly, this projection suggests that the five impulse waves have already been completed, and the next stage is the formation of the ABC corrective waves. Waves A and B have already played out, leaving wave C to complete the structure and create the last corrective wave in the pattern.

With this correction in mind, the analyst used Fibonacci levels for additional insights into how it plays out. Using a trend-based Fibonacci retracement, the analyst predicted that Dogecoin could retrace to $0.213 as the price mark aligns well with the 0.382 Fibonacci retracement level from its recent peak in December.

Similarly, the 0.618 Fibonacci retracement level, calculated from the wave 4 low to the wave 5 peak, suggests a target of $0.235. A green box zone between these two levels is highlighted as the likely liquidity zone before the next bullish leg.

The correction, if it happens, doesn’t necessarily spell doom for Dogecoin. This is because the meme coin has consistently revisited the 0.382 level during past market cycles before surpassing its all-time highs. Therefore, a repeat of this behavior could set the stage for another Dogecoin price rally over a longer timeframe that will eventually break above $0.73 and set a new all-time high.

Zooming In: Wyckoff Phases And Short-Term Prediction

When analyzing the current price action, the analyst identifies Wyckoff Distribution Schematic #2 as the prevailing pattern for Dogecoin. This method separates market movements into phases (A to E) to predict price behavior. According to the analysis, Dogecoin is transitioning through these phases and is expected to enter phase E by January 23, 2025.

Further examination of the 4-hour chart reveals an ABC corrective pattern, with wave C anticipated to mirror the magnitude of wave A’s decline. The analyst calculates this drop as aligning perfectly with the 0.382 Fibonacci target at $0.213. Using additional Fibonacci retracements and extensions, short-term support and resistance zones have been identified, further reinforcing the $0.213 to $0.235 liquidity zone. With this, the analyst predicted a Dogecoin price bottom between January 30 and February 3, 2025, before it transitions toward a bullish trend.

Looking ahead, the analyst suggests that Dogecoin is building momentum for a significant upward movement once it completes its correction. Notably, the analyst predicted that Dogecoin will rebound and reach $1.9 once the correction is completed.

At the time of writing, Dogecoin is trading at $0.3577.

data.title: Apple (AAPL.US) introduces the new iPhone 16e, with a starting price of RMB4,499 for the Chinese market.
data.description: Apple (AAPL.US) officially launched a new iPhone model, the iPhone 16e, on Wednesday, which is priced lower than Apple's traditional flagship iPhone series.The iPhone 16e 128GB starts at RMB4,499 and will be available for pre-order at 9:00 pm Beijing time on February 21 and will be released on February 28. It comes in classic white and black colors, and users can choose one. The new device has eliminated the Home button and fingerprint recognition function and replaced it with Apple's Face ID facial recognition technology. It also features a modernized notch screen design, which is consistent with the appearance style of Apple's mobile phones in recent years.The iPhone 16e is equipped with the same A18 chip as the mainstream iPhone 16 series, which means that the device can run all the latest applications and games and has the same performance as the more expensive iPhone.It is worth noting that the iPhone 16e is the first Apple phone to be equipped with its own cellular modem (C1). Previously, Apple's iPhone devices relied on modems provided by Qualcomm. In addition, the iPhone 16e is equipped with only one camera, while Apple's most advanced iPhone models can be equipped with up to three cameras.In recent years, Apple's iPhone sales have been uneven, so the company hopes to promote the growth of its most important product category through this more affordable device. In the quarter ended last December, Apple's iPhone sales fell 1% year-on-year to US$69 billion.The low-priced iPhone is crucial for Apple, as they can attract new users into the Apple ecosystem. It is worth noting that the iPhone 16e supports "Apple Intelligence", becoming the cheapest device to support this feature. "Apple Intelligence" includes image generation, notification summaries and other artificial intelligence functions. Previously, only iPhone 16 and iPhone 15 Pro series models supported this feature.Apple's stock price reacted little to the news, closing up 0.16% to US$244.87 on Wednesday.

data.title: Al Khaleej Investment P.J.S.C. and 2 Other Promising Penny Stocks to Watch in 2025
data.description:
In the dynamic world of penny stocks, investors are always on the lookout for promising opportunities that can deliver significant returns. As we approach 2025, three penny stocks have caught our attention: Al Khaleej Investment P.J.S.C. (ADX:KICO), Globalstar Inc. (NYSEARCA: GSAT), and ChargePoint Holdings Inc. (NYSE: CHPT). Let's dive into the key factors that make these stocks worth watching in the coming year.



1. Al Khaleej Investment P.J.S.C. (ADX:KICO)
Al Khaleej Investment P.J.S.C. is a diversified investment holding company with a strong presence in the real estate and investment sectors. With a strategic vision and market expertise, KICO has identified and capitalized on emerging opportunities in the United Arab Emirates. The company's diversified portfolio spans residential and commercial properties, facilities management, financial services, and portfolio investments, reducing risk and providing multiple revenue streams.



KICO's commitment to transparency and maximizing returns on diversified investments, coupled with an experienced management team, sets it apart from other penny stocks in the sector. Despite a recent decline in financial performance, the company's strategic vision and diversified portfolio suggest potential for future growth. Investors should monitor KICO's financial performance and market trends closely to make informed investment decisions.

2. Globalstar Inc. (NYSEARCA: GSAT)
Globalstar Inc. provides mobile satellite services that play an essential role in Low-Earth Orbit (LEO) communications. The company's Always On and Always Reliable proprietary satellites allow connectivity in remote areas. GSAT stock climbed sharply in November 2024 when the company announced a strategic partnership with Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), providing Globalstar access to $1.5 billion in Apple funding to buy new satellites and nearly double its existing network.



Globalstar also recently announced a partnership with Peiker Holding Gmbh to bring its satellite-based emergency service and telematics capabilities to automotive OEMs. Despite a planned reverse stock split and geopolitical risks, GSAT's strong partnerships and well-capitalized position make it an attractive penny stock for risk-tolerant investors with a long-term horizon.

3. ChargePoint Holdings Inc. (NYSE: CHPT)
ChargePoint Holdings Inc. went public in 2021 as part of a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) and has since faced numerous headwinds, including slow demand for electric vehicles (EVs) and higher interest rates. However, the company's partnership with General Motors (NYSE: GM) to develop 500 high-speed charging stations suggests a long-term focus on growth and market expansion.



While CHPT faces competition from established players like Tesla and EVgo, its well-capitalized position and long-term focus on the growing EV market make it an intriguing penny stock for investors with a high risk tolerance and a long-term investment horizon.

In conclusion, Al Khaleej Investment P.J.S.C., Globalstar Inc., and ChargePoint Holdings Inc. are three promising penny stocks to watch in 2025. Each company offers unique opportunities and challenges, and investors should carefully consider their risk tolerance and investment horizon before making any decisions. By staying informed about these companies' financial performance and market trends, investors can make well-informed decisions and potentially capitalize on the growth opportunities these penny stocks present.
